nasb.text: The oracle of him who hears the words of God, And knows the knowledge of the Most High, Who sees the vision of the Almighty, Falling down, yet having his eyes uncovered.

esv.text: the oracle of him who hears the words of God, and knows the knowledge of the Most High, who sees the vision of the Almighty, falling down with his eyes uncovered:

cnv.text: 那得聽　神的話語、 明白至高者的知識、 得見全能者的異象、 身體仆倒而眼目睜開的人說：

ccb.text: 他得听上帝之言， 明白至高者的旨意， 俯伏在地， 得见全能者的异象。
